item.title: Epstein files highlight how the wealthy borrow against art collections
item.description: Art loans are typically used by the wealthy to provide ready cash, leverage financial investments and avoid hefty tax bills.

item.title: Equinox chairman says 'health is the new luxury' as wellness spending soars

item.title: Washington state Senate approves wealth tax: Here's what to know
item.description: CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with the latest news.

item.title: Inside the luxury wellness boom: Here's what to know
item.description: CNBC's Robert Frank joins 'Squawk Box' with a closer look at the new luxuries for the rich: longevity and health.
